description.en: Attacks an enemy. After attacking, if the enemy has no <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color>, increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>. If the enemy has a <color=#28d9ed>buff</color>, has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다. 공격 후 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>가 없다면 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 증가시킵니다. <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 보유하고 있다면 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、対象に<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>がない場合、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>UPさせる。対象に<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>がある場合、<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。攻击后,若目标没有<color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,则使自身的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。若附带<color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,则有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率解除目标的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) When an enemy uses a <color=#28d9ed>non-attack skill</color>, activates <color=#28d9ed>Agile Response</color>.\nGrants increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack and Defense</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: (발동 효과) 적이 <color=#28d9ed>공격이 아닌 스킬</color> 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>신속 대응</color> 효과가 발동합니다.\n아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력과 방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)敵が<color=#28d9ed>攻撃以外のスキル</color>を使用時、<color=#28d9ed>【迅速対応】</color>を発動する。\n【迅速対応】:味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力と防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: (触发效果)敌人使用<color=#28d9ed>非攻击类技能</color>时,触发<color=#28d9ed>迅速应对</color>效果。\n使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力和防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1\n回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> on all targets for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 대상 모두에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color>를 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で対象全体に<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率对所有目标造成<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nWhen attacking an enemy inflicted with a <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color> with a <color=#28d9ed>single-target attack</color>, inflicts Stunned for 2 turns. (Irremovable)
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n<color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 보유 한 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>단일 공격</color> 했을 때 2턴 동안 스턴 상태가 됩니다. (해제 불가)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>のある対象に<color=#28d9ed>単体攻撃</color>を与えた場合、2ターンの間スタン状態になる。(解除不可)
description.zh: (被动效果)\n对附带<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>的目标发动<color=#28d9ed>单体攻击</color>时,使其陷入晕眩状态,持续2回合。(无法解除)

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Flames

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
Damage taken is reduced by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

받는 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>감소합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
受けるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>減少する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
受到的伤害降低<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
